title: Adamas Trust Q1 2026 slides: EAD surges 45% as portfolio hits $10.9B
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Adamas Trust's EAD surged 45% in Q1 2026, reaching $10.9 billion. The increase reflects strong earnings and capital strength. The portfolio growth is notable.
excerpt: Adamas Trust's EAD surged 45% in Q1 2026, reaching $10.9 billion. The increase reflects strong earnings and capital strength. The portfolio growth is notable.

content.introduction: Adamas Trust's EAD surged 45% in Q1 2026, reaching $10.9 billion. The increase reflects strong earnings and capital strength. The portfolio growth is notable.
body: The 45% year-over-year increase in EAD reflects robust dividend coverage at 126%, emphasizing improved earnings power and capital durability.
